name: Xilinmen Furniture Co.,Ltd
summary: Xilinmen Furniture Co.,Ltd designs, develops, produces, and sells furniture products in China. The company offers mattresses, cabinets, bed stools, tables, TV cabinets, sofas, and soft beds for bedroom; sofas, tables, corner a few, and TV cabinets for living room; dining tables and chairs, sideboards, and wine cabinets for restaurants; desks, book chairs, and bookcases for study; and children's mattress, beds, desks, chairs, and bookcases. It also provides pillows, bedding kits, home decoration products, and table lamps. The company offers its products under the Hiro Gate, Frenchman, Erna, love times, BBR, Brano, and other brands. Xilinmen Furniture Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
